title: weigela × lavallei
intro: Weigela × lavallei, also known as Weigela florida, is a hybrid flowering plant belonging to the family Ericaceae. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant has been found to possess various health benefits, including reducing fever, soothing digestive issues, and acting as an antiseptic. Weigela × lavallei can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, making it a versatile herbal remedy.
